concurrency_probe.occupancy_method: sum(successful client elapsed) / (request batch wall * asserted workers); includes client/network/queue time and is not server worker busy time

prefetch_probe.ratio_scope: Ratios require a script-generated fresh attribution namespace, a scoped exact-zero initial aggregate with no skips, a successful trigger, exactly one completed event, and a positive stored delta. Follow-up pages 2-3 are observed; stored pages not read by this probe count as unused.
